textParts.text: BERTA - Oh.. You're alive?'
BERTA - Well, I guess you could atleast *try* to survive
BERTA - And maybe also expand this tiny deathbox
BERTA - I would really prefer it if it wasn't so claustrophobic when the pirates kill us
BERTA - Though I doubt you could afford much
BERTA - Wait, you had a GUN? I thought I hid all of those..
BERTA - Well, if you managed to defeat those space pirates you might be able to afford a turret now
BERTA - Or you could just lie down and rest
BERTA - Surely nothing bad could come of that
BERTA - I'm sure the pirates will just forget about all you did to them when they see what a chill person you are
BERTA - Hmph, absolute garbage, theses bots have nothing on the build quality of the great BERTA
BERTA - I guess that might pose some problems for you though..
BERTA - Those space pirate bots must barely provide a couple of titanium! Not that I care
BERTA - Though I guess you could build a resource generator if you haven't already
BERTA - But it really is time to give up, their assault will only get heavier given what you stole
BERTA - You really are trying huh?
BERTA - Couldn't you just give it back? Why would you even steal something like that?
BERTA - Can't believe I am going to die for THAT
BERTA - You know they will probably be able to send another 7 ships or something before you reach that warp gate?
BERTA - Which I hope is where you are heading because there is no way you will be able to escape otherwise
BERTA - I wonder were I put that blaster of mine..
BERTA - If I could just find that and a couple of new arms I could get rid of both the pesky pilo...
BERTA - Oh, you were listening huh? Good, uuh, I was just talking about how I could help taking care of the bots
BERTA - I was not plotting to kill you or anything
BERTA - You just need to, ehrm, find my old weapon and give it to me
BERTA - You definitly shouldn't use it for yourself cause, that would be bad..
BERTA - You know, even though you are much inferior to the great BERTA..
BERTA - I am a little impressed you made it this far, I am still waiting for my weapon though...
BERTA - And definitly not to kill you and tour the galaxy alone
BERTA - But hey, for completly unrelated reasons, could you give back complete controll of the ship?
BERTA - So I could.. help pilot it
BERTA - Hm, this thing might actually make it, but how do I get rid of it once we reach the warp gate...
BERTA - ..
BERTA - Ah your back! great
BERTA - Ooooh, that is what airlock password was...
BERTA - I could use that
BERTA - Hey, you don't happen to have some tape laying around do you?
BERTA - And a pen perhaps?
BERTA - Wow, great job pilot!
BERTA - It seems there is only one ship hunting us left!
BERTA - After that we are free to roam the galaxy, together!
BERTA - We really must celebrate this afterwards!
BERTA - I will prepare a wonderfull gift for you
BERTA - You made it!
BERTA - I never doubted you for a second!
BERTA - Walk over to the cockpit, I have a surprise for you
BERTA - I am sure you will be overjoyed with what I have prepared!
BERTA - Just press the gift button for your gift

endScreenText:
After pressing the button you are flung into space,
 never to be seen again.
 The pirates, or rather the pirate king 
who controls them never managed to retrieve the 
luxurios fermented golden foxcatjelly coffee beans 
you stole. 
BERTA on the other hand is living the good life, 
traveling between planets, sunbathing, 
shooting asteroids and the occasional trader. 
You know, AI stuff. 
But, hey, you managed to escape the pirates, 
so, you won?
